purpose: Secondary robustness analysis of the already frozen Program O mechanism under Garrido-style relevant risks. It cannot select cells, tune, promote, reopen Program O, or modify Program O-R.

primary_cell.note: The controller model remains fixed at .75/.90 in every environment. True cell rho/share are never exposed to the controller.

risks.R22_claim_boundary: product-blind downstream robustness control; not a direct product-mix risk
risks.R24_assignment_rule: contingent surge is consumed by the next scheduled demand order and inherits that order's already-frozen product label; report product counts and treat this as a conditional model assumption
risks.R3: disabled and event count must be zero

gates.G0: On all 12 burned tapes, reconstruct belief_mpc__3 with fixed .75/.90 model parameters; calendar indices must equal the historical corrective-validation indices. Direct full-DES replays of the reconstructed policy and frozen static comparator must match the custodied matrices bit-exactly.
gates.G1: At thesis frequency phi=1, each risk alone must fire across the 12-tape block; every populated affected_ops entry must be a nonempty subset of its frozen operation map, no foreign risk may fire, and R3 count must be zero.
gates.G1_liveness_fixture: A separate implementation-only high-frequency fixture may demonstrate process liveness but can never rescue a failed thesis-rate G1.
gates.G2: Blocked until G0/G1 outputs receive an independent signed verification. The map remains secondary robustness only.

D1_under_risk: hypothesis only; not authorized by this contract
program_p: not authorized; requires external domain facts on deadlines, criticality, shared line, and advance signal
